title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.430 - Taxes a lien on property
text:
80.430.  Taxes a lien on property. — All general and special taxes levied by the board of trustees of any town upon property therein, in conformity to the laws of the state and the ordinances of such town, shall constitute a lien upon the property upon which they are levied, until paid.
(RSMo 1939 § 7258) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7107; 1919 § 8556; 1909 § 9444
